# FORENSIC_AUDIT

This directory contains the automatically-generated repository settings audit reports.

Reports are produced by `_OPS/scripts/repo_self_audit.py` and committed by the
`.github/workflows/repo-self-audit.yml` workflow.

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `repo_settings_report.json` | Machine-readable JSON report |
| `repo_settings_report.md` | Human-readable Markdown report |

**Do not edit these files manually.** Re-run the workflow to regenerate them.
